title: Apocalyptic Survival
description: A Zombie Apocalypse that keeps closer to Minecraft's fantasy themes - there are guns, but not many.
body:
The world has essentially ended, at least for humanity. The undead rule the night, hunting the scattered survivors between crumbling cities and dangerous ruins. 
Dark magic, powerful weapons and armor, and empowered companions will aid your survival - but could also bolster your enemies.

Designed with multiplayer in mind but fully playable solo.
